title: kaempferia ochroleuca
intro: Kaempferia ochroleuca, also known as Thai Zinger or Yellow Ginger, is a plant species in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). This plant is native to Thailand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kaempferia ochroleuca include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight loss. Kaempferia ochroleuca is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in topical creams and ointments for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects.
